thread_title: 分享#收到了来自“黄印餐厅”的作品投喂 Received a submission from "Hastur’s Restaurant"

content: Of course, we’ve done our best to use the paid version. AI translation often works quite well for general natural language, but it becomes much more difficult when it comes to integrating character settings, world-building, game mechanics, and conversational context. We’ve never believed that AI alone can do a perfect job; it’s simply the baseline solution that allows us to bring the game to more players. Our goal is to gradually improve upon this foundation.

校猫碎碎念#Translation Plan Update 本地化计划变更

content: Factual clarification: Most of the first three chapters have already been re-translated by human translators. However, due to insufficient testing time, some inconsistencies and errors in the translations still remain. With the adjustment of our work priorities, there will be more time dedicated to improving these translations in the future.

校猫碎碎念#Translation Plan Update 本地化计划变更

content:
To be honest, Light, I am a little sad, because I loved the recent human translations. Agrippa’s lines in the Roman event story were great. Doresain’s translated lines had a lot of personality and charm. I can look past the small issues, it’s still a lot better than what we had before.

I thought we’ll always have that quality from now on… but I understand, I know you guys are working really hard. I’ll be supporting you and I hope one day we can get simultaneous human translations again. I’m also happy to volunteer and help.

content: I think you guys are really incredible, you are doing a lot with such a tiny team. Thank you for everything!
